# Organization-specific sanitization patterns
# One pattern per line (grep -E extended regex syntax)
# Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines are ignored
#
# These patterns catch leakage from the deploying organization.
# Add patterns specific to your org's domains, naming conventions,
# and infrastructure identifiers.

# Rowan County domains
rowancountync\.gov

# Internal DNS suffixes
\.internal\.

# Add additional org-specific patterns below as needed
